title: salix × digenea
intro: Salix × digenea, also known as the hybrid willow or weeping willow, is a plant species that is a cross between the white willow (Salix alba) and the goosely willow (Salix babylonica). The bark of this plant contains salicin, a compound with anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, making it useful for medicinal purposes. The medicinal properties of Salix × digenea have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, headaches, and rheumatism, due to its ability to reduce pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of salicylic acid-based creams and ointments, and it can also be consumed as a tea to reap its health benefits.
